scripts.watch: parcel watch dev/scripts.js --dist-dir dist/js --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --public-url ./ & parcel watch scss/style.scss --dist-dir . --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --public-url ./ & browser-sync start --proxy "https://portfolio.local" --https --files "style.css, dist/js/**/*.js, **/*.php"
scripts.build: parcel build dev/scripts.js --dist-dir dist/js --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --public-url ./ && parcel build scss/style.scss --dist-dir . --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --public-url ./
